<!--
Title (the field above): one imperative line with a Conventional Commits prefix,
e.g. feat(android): build and publish an APK on release
Common prefixes: feat, fix, ci, docs, refactor, test, chore, build, perf
-->

## Summary

<!-- 2-3 sentences: what changed and *why*. The motivation matters more than the
diff, which reviewers can read themselves. -->

## Changes

<!-- Short bullets, grouped by area. -->
-

## Verification

<!-- What you checked, and honestly what you didn't. -->
- [ ] Tests pass (`uv run pytest`)
-

## Notes / follow-ups

<!-- Deferred work, risks, anything reviewers should know.
Link issues with "Closes #123" to auto-close them on merge. -->
-
